rows.label: qev025601_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Excuse me.
I am currently collecting certain data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hrmmm... This emotional pattern is "Anger."
This looks like it will be a good sample.
Shall we try to pacify this anger as a test?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0003
rows.name:
You there, maintaining a state of elevated blood pressure like that
cannot be good for your health, can it?
You'd better stop immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0004
rows.name:
Wh-! Who the hell are you?!
Do you have any idea how it feels to have something precious to you damaged?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0005
rows.name:
What do you mean "not good"!
It's not like I'm angry because I want to be.
Are you trying to pick a fight with me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0006
rows.name:
I wouldn't sell you a fight, would I?
Because I estimate that selling fights is highly unlikely to yield a profit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0007
rows.name:
I don't have the patience to deal with a Ma-non who can't read the room right now...
Please, just go away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Oh dear, I seem to have been criticized.
And with something as incomprehensible as "reading a room"...
A room is generally something you enter, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0009
rows.name:
Um... you there.
From your perspective, did anything seem strange about my conversation just now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0011
rows.name: Point out that he was rubbing the man the wrong way.

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0021
rows.name: Smile and say there was nothing strange at all.

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Is that so...
You are quite a mysterious creature,
just like the other Earthlings, aren't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0011
rows.name: You're the first Earthling who has ever said something like that to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Perhaps a part of you is broken as an Earthling, isn't it?
Thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0013
rows.name:
I have attempted to converse with various Earthlings.
However, everyone always gives me a reaction like this person's.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Because of that, I have been trying to read and understand Earthling emotion values
as numerical data using this observation device, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0015
rows.name:
It seems the subjects' emotions won't shift as I desire.
Because of that, my understanding is hardly progressing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0016
rows.name:
...What do you say?
Would you be willing to assist with my research
for the sake of deepening the friendship between Ma-non and Earthlings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0017
rows.name:
First, please try returning this person's "Anger" state
back to "Calm."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0018
rows.name:
By analyzing the causal relationship of that change,
I will brilliantly understand Earthling "Anger."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0023
rows.name:
Continuing to elevate your blood pressure while remaining in an "Anger" state
cannot be good for your health, can it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0024
rows.name:
Yet why does this person try to maintain that state?
Does he have a habit of self-harm, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0025
rows.name:
To unravel this mystery, please try bringing his emotional value
down to "Calm" somehow, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0026
rows.name:
This person is the next sample.
It appears she is in a state of "Sorrow."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Excuse me.
What kind of event occurred to put you in a state of "Sorrow"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0028
rows.name: Eh... How do you know about that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0029
rows.name:
With this observation device I invented,
I can tell at a glance, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0030
rows.name:
The activity of your brainwaves is depressed, and your body temperature has dropped.
I can conclusively determine that this is indeed "Sorrow"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0032
rows.name:
Ooh! An alkaline aqueous solution is leaking from your eyes!
So these are Earthling tears, are they![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0033
rows.name:
Bobby, a BLADE who frequented my shop...
He died on the battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0034
rows.name:
*Sniff*... He used to sit at his usual spot at the counter,
happily eating my Special Hamburger without ever getting tired of it, making little jokes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0035
rows.name:
He was a sloppy guy, but
he was like a son to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0036
rows.name:
Ooh! The value of "Sorrow" is rapidly increasing!
This is very intriguing data![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0030
rows.name: Stop

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0031
rows.name: Show concern for Pollen and stop Chiopittas.

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0040
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0041
rows.name: Let Chiopittas do as he pleases.

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Con-cern?
You uttered a word with quite a complex nuance, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0038
rows.name:
I completely fail to understand it, but... for now,
I will leave this situation to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0039
rows.name:
...What is it?
What exactly did you guys come here to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Eh?!
You came to comfort me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0041
rows.name:
That's... I appreciate the thought, but...
*Sniff* Bobby is never coming back.
But, I suppose...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Well then, Pollen-san.
How exactly can your "Sorrow" be returned to a normal value?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0043
rows.name:
*Sniff*...
What have you been rambling about since earlier?
Are you perhaps trying to comfort me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0044
rows.name:
If lowering the value of "Sorrow" is called com-fort-ing,
then I am most certainly com-fort-ing you, aren't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0045
rows.name: Now then, please explain the key points to decreasing those numbers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0046
rows.name: ...If I could just get my hands on the wristwatch that boy always wore...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0047
rows.name: I feel like I'd be able to keep him close by and never forget him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0048
rows.name:
Hmmm... Is this Earth's unique culture,
something known as the occult?
Keeping the dead close by sounds like a terrifying prospect, doesn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0049
rows.name:
However, I understand.
Now then, please go acquire that wristwatch immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0050
rows.name:
What's that...?
You're going to go out of your way to fetch it for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0051
rows.name:
Yeah...
I don't really get you guys, but
you don't seem like bad people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0052
rows.name:
Well then, to decrease this person's "Sorrow,"
please acquire that wristwatch, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0053
rows.name:
Next is this person.
Her heart rate is elevated, and her body temperature has risen considerably.
She is clearly in an abnormal state, isn't she.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0054
rows.name:
It seems these symptoms are occurring for some emotional reason, but...
I have no idea how to categorize this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0055
rows.name: ...Well, shall we observe for a little bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0056
rows.name:
Christopher...
Why do you keep ignoring my feelings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0057
rows.name:
I've confessed to you so many times, but you just play it cool and won't say a word...
Is that what you call your aesthetic?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0058
rows.name:
These feelings of mine...
What do I have to do to make you understand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0059
rows.name:
...It is neither "Anger" nor "Sorrow."
It appears to be an emotion mixed with various things, doesn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0060
rows.name: Do you understand what kind of emotion she is experiencing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0051
rows.name: Answer that it is "Love".

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0061
rows.name: Shake your head and say you don't understand at all.

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0061
rows.name:
"Love," is it?
You are using quite complex words again, aren't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0062
rows.name:
...Loving someone makes your chest hurt?
If it's reached that point, isn't it completely an illness?
Doesn't she require treatment?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0063
rows.name:
Is she going to be okay?
Well, shall we try asking her directly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0064
rows.name:
Hmmm... Even you cannot understand it...
This person must be suffering from a highly abnormal case, mustn't she.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0065
rows.name:
Aaah! Christopher, I love you!
Please... accept this love...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0066
rows.name:
She suddenly started screaming.
And now she appears to be falling into hyperventilation with rough breathing, doesn't she.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0067
rows.name:
What exactly is... "Love"?
Is it some kind of disease?
Well, shall we try asking her directly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0068
rows.name:
...You there. Are you currently in a state of "Love"?
Please explain that specifically for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0069
rows.name:
...Whoa! What's your deal?!
Were you eavesdropping on me?!
You little punk, if you push your luck, I'll bash your head in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0070
rows.name:
I see...
"Love" is a violent thing, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0071
rows.name:
Violent...?! Oh no...
I'm supposed to be a cute girl that Christopher would like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0072
rows.name:
That's right... Say goodbye to the old tomboy me.
I can't lose my temper even at a weirdo like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0073
rows.name:
You've had heart palpitations and a flushed face for a while now.
How can this abnormality of yours be resolved?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0074
rows.name: I want to observe the moment your "Love" subsides, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0075
rows.name:
When my "Love" subsides...?
Well, if he finally accepted my feelings, my heart would settle down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0076
rows.name:
Until then, this uneasy feeling
is never going to leave my chest...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0077
rows.name:
Mailing something as vague as "feelings"
seems quite difficult, doesn't it.
...Do you have any good ideas?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0070
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0071
rows.name: Suggest sending a love letter.

rows.label: qev025601_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025601_SEL0081
rows.name: Shake your head, saying you have no ideas.

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0078
rows.name:
...Ah! That's a great idea!
A roundabout method like that might actually be more effective on him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0079
rows.name: Then how about you guys fetch the perfect present for him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0080
rows.name: I'll slip it into a love letter and make my approach![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0081
rows.name:
Are you also bad with "Love"?
I agree with you.
It seems to be a very troublesome emotion, doesn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0082
rows.name: ...That's it! How about you guys fetch the perfect present for him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0083
rows.name:
Then I'll slip it into a love letter...
And make my approach![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0084
rows.name:
Yeah... For a present, maybe a Red Thallus Antenna dropped by a Thallus
under the Big Arch would look sharp?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0085
rows.name:
Wearing it as an accessory around the neck feels pretty cool, right?
Like, "Wild and totally manly!" kind of vibe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0086
rows.name:
Alternatively, since Christopher likes tinkering with machines,
maybe he'd be happy if I gave him an Elemental Cluster... I think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0087
rows.name:
Aaah~ I'm so torn on which one to choose...
Alright! I want to decide by looking at the actual items, so fetch both for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0088
rows.name:
If I can just obtain the data,
I'm certain I will be able to understand "Love," won't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025601_MSG0089
rows.name:
Please find what she desires.
And please cure her "Love."[ST:wait ]
